Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.vacuum

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.vacuum
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.vacuum
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.vacuum used by neqsim.process.safety.vacuum
    Class
    Description
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    Vacuum-collapse (external-pressure / implosion) screening for a blocked-in vessel that cools.
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.CoolingPoint
    A single point on the constant-volume cooling curve.
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.VacuumVerdict
    Verdict of a vacuum-collapse screening.
    VacuumCollapseResult
    Result of a VacuumCollapseAnalyzer constant-volume cooling screening.
